name: Sediment Geochemical Profile from LTp22-1 Event
description: Dataset containing sediment depth profiles with geochemical element concentrations (Si, K, Ca, Ti, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ge, Sr, Zr, Cd, Ce, Ta), age estimates, and spatial-temporal metadata from a single event (LTp22-1) on 2022-04-08 at 21.277661°N, 104.690167°W, 1430m elevation.
keywords: Si K Ca Ti V Cr Mn Fe Ni Cu Zn Ge Sr Zr Cd Ce Ta
